# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [Gloria Ntazola Sparks Debate Over Modern Marriage Timelines](https://zandani.co.ke/article/gloria-ntazola-sparks-debate-over-modern-marriage-timelines) - Content creator Gloria Ntazola has triggered a conversation about how societal pressure and rigid life timelines impact marital success in Kenya.
- [Wamezidi! Kenyans Slam 'Horizontal Engineering' Club Attire](https://zandani.co.ke/article/wamezidi-kenyans-slam-horizontal-engineering-club-attire) - Kenya faces uproar over increasingly revealing club attire (May 2026). Debate questions if it's style or 'auditioning for horizontal engineering.'
- [Kamene Goro Confirms Marriage Status Following Hospital Stay](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kamene-goro-confirms-marriage-status-following-hospital-stay) - Media personality Kamene Goro has reaffirmed her marriage to DJ Bonez after addressing public speculation about his absence during her recent month-long hospitalization.
- [Entertainment Weekly unveils major television and film projects](https://zandani.co.ke/article/entertainment-weekly-unveils-major-television-and-film-projects) - Entertainment Weekly has released its industry preview issue highlighting major television and film productions for the coming year.
- [Raiders select Fernando Mendoza as Seahawks win Super Bowl 60](https://zandani.co.ke/article/raiders-select-fernando-mendoza-seahawks-win-super-bowl) - Las Vegas Raiders pick Fernando Mendoza first in the NFL draft while Seattle Seahawks win Super Bowl 60 and announce franchise for sale soon after.
- [Public Service Commission Announces Over 400 Government Vacancies](https://zandani.co.ke/article/public-service-commission-recruitment-vacancies) - The Public Service Commission has opened applications for over 400 professional positions across Kenya. Submit your credentials by May 6, 2026.
- [Lydia Wanjiru Unveils Results of Her Body Transformation](https://zandani.co.ke/article/lydia-wanjiru-body-transformation) - Lydia Wanjiru reveals her final look after undergoing liposuction and BBL surgery. See the results of her body transformation. See what happened
- [Zari Hassan Celebrates Son Quincy Tlale on 19th Birthday](https://zandani.co.ke/article/zari-hassan-quincy-tlale) - Zari Hassan praises her son Quincy Tlale as he turns 19 and pursues a career in law. See how the family celebrates this milestone. See what happened
- [Sueh Owino Embraces Sustainable Living in New Mud Home](https://zandani.co.ke/article/sueh-owino-mud-home) - Content creator Sueh Owino shifts to eco-friendly earthen architecture, redefining luxury through her coastal heritage. See what happened
- [KRA whistleblower tips recover KES 6.8 billion in taxes](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kra-whistleblower-tips-recover-kes-6-8-billion-in-taxes) - KRA's iWhistle Platform Bolsters Tax Recovery with Digital Intelligence Kenya Revenue Authority's iWhistle portal successfully recovered KES 6.8 billion in taxes during the financial year ending June 2025.
